changelog:
- 24/7 Low Network Mode: 1000MB -> 60MB data savings with aggressive MuLaw codec fallback
- Audio Processing: Skipped high-shelf/denoiser CPU waste on low-bandwidth paths
- Audio Hardware: New single-pole IIR anti-alias smoothing filter (α=0.58)
- Zero-Copy Video: Raw binary camera transport over websockets for real-time video
